ksa_text: Ability to design technical procedures, processes, and system components, integrating technology solutions into cohesive systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: ability from Technology Fundamentals (domain affinity 0.82); no DE-specific signals and low domain affinity. STRM composite score is strong (0.4339, top tier for this dataset). A working DE would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
